final:
module SRAM_Cell (
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input we,
    input clk,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            q <= data_in; // Store data
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= ~data_in;
    end
  end

endmodule
